special_mechanics.description: Grant Danasty can change direction in mid-jump

tier_notes: Tier 2 - Empirical/Qualitative. Sources document game mechanics and character abilities but do not provide quantified physics values (pixel speeds, acceleration rates, gravity constants, etc.). Movement characteristics inferred from gameplay descriptions and character abilities documentation.
